title: DOM & Events
summary: Selecting elements, changing content, and handling user events.

examples.title: Click event
examples.description: Increment a counter when the button is clicked.

files.css:
body { font-family: sans-serif; padding: 1.5rem; }
button { padding: 0.5rem 1rem; cursor: pointer; }

examples.title: Input event
examples.description: Mirror text from an input field as the user types.

practice.description: Add a button that toggles the background color of the page between white and light yellow.

starter.css: body { font-family: sans-serif; padding: 2rem; transition: background 0.2s; }

hints: Track on/off with a boolean variable
